TEXT.source: Amis Wikipedia, article: Ululu_lotok(烏魯魯岩)
TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Ululu lotok O teked a lotok no Yuncumin no Ostorariya konini, i 1981 miheca matoro' no Linheko malo Palapalaan-dafong no hekal, pacaliwen no Yuncumin ko sifo patireng to Ululu-Kataceta Koyin no kitakit( :Uluṟu-Kata Tjuṯa National Park). Kaitiraan Ona lotok itiraay i satimolan no Saka'amisan-Etal no Ostorariya, o satata'angay a 'ongcoy no sasifo'an no Ostorariya, o kamaro'an nona 'ongcoy i laloma'ay no Ululu-Kataceta Koyin no kitakit. O samangataay a tokay cila'eday to 335 kilo, o palakitingay a lalan nani Ululu tahira I tokay ira ko 450 kilo. O fangcaly pala no Ananko-yuncumin no Ostorariya kona niyaro'.O tadamaanay dafong no hekal konini hananay to Linhoko a mitoro' kona pala. O kaitiraan nona 'ongcoy I sasifo'an no Ostorariya a kitakit, o masacecayay a 'ongcoy,midodoay to Awkosto-Lotok ko kakahad nira. O nika cimarad kona lotok, orasaka halafin mapa'orad kahengangay, oninian ko sakakahengan a manengnengen no mita. O mihecaan nona lotok 的年齡 O maro'ay itini a Ananko-yuncumin I 'ayaw no cecay 'ofad ko mihecaan itiniay to a maro'. O makeraay a coka I dapiyac ira ko 1000 mihecaan ko katelang nira a likisi. Ona Ululu-lotok ono Ananko-yuncumin a teked a dafong, ano pakaynien I rikec nipacaliwan no yuncumin I sifo tahira I 2084 mihecaan. Anini sato I, ano sapicomodaw mi nengneng tona Ululu-lotok caay kaay ka'eca ka papayso to 38 rimo'od payso no Ostorariya, manga'angay milafin to tolo a romi'ad. Ona payso o sakowan no yuncumin ko misorotay halo payso no yubcumin. Ci'icel ko pilalang a mikaric tona 'ongcoy 2020 miheca, ira cowa ka hayien no yuncumin patedo sanay a mikaric tona Ululu 'ongcoy, tata'ang ko fangafang itiya. Itira to a miliyaw a milekal to pilalang a mikaric tona lotok.Itira I 2017miheca saka11folad sakacecay romi'ad,ira ko pikayki no Mikowanay tona Ululu-Kataceta Koyin no kitakit malacecay ko pisetek to sowal, I 2019miheca saka 10 folad saka 26 romi'ad ci'icel to ko pilalang a mikaric tona 'ongcoy.
S.PHON: o~u~uɾo~u~uɾo~u~u ɾo~uto~uk o~u təkəɬ~ɮ a ɾo~uto~uk no~u jo~u~unʦo~u~umin no~u o~usto~urarija ko~unini, i **** miħəʦa mato~uro~uʡ no~u ɾinħəko~u maɾo~u paɾapaɾaan-ɬ~ɮafo~uŋ no~u ħəkaɾ, paʦaɾiwən no~u jo~u~unʦo~u~umin ko~u sifo~u patirəŋ to~u o~u~uɾo~u~uɾo~u~u-kataʦəta ko~ujin no~u kitakit( :o~u~uɾo~u~u*o~u~u-kata tjo~u~u*a natio~unaɾ park). kaitiraan o~una ɾo~uto~uk itiraaj i satimo~uɾan no~u sakaʡamisan-ətaɾ no~u o~usto~urarija, o~u satataʡaŋaj a ʡo~uŋʦo~uj no~u sasifo~uʡan no~u o~usto~urarija, o~u kamaro~uʡan no~una ʡo~uŋʦo~uj i ɾaɾo~umaʡaj no~u o~u~uɾo~u~uɾo~u~u-kataʦəta ko~ujin no~u kitakit. o~u samaŋataaj a to~ukaj ʦiɾaʡəɬ~ɮaj to~u *** kiɾo~u, o~u paɾakitiŋaj a ɾaɾan nani o~u~uɾo~u~uɾo~u~u taħira i to~ukaj ira ko~u *** kiɾo~u. o~u faŋʦaɾj paɾa no~u ananko~u-jo~u~unʦo~u~umin no~u o~usto~urarija ko~una nijaro~uʡ.o~u taɬ~ɮamaanaj ɬ~ɮafo~uŋ no~u ħəkaɾ ko~unini ħananaj to~u ɾinħo~uko~u a mito~uro~uʡ ko~una paɾa. o~u kaitiraan no~una ʡo~uŋʦo~uj i sasifo~uʡan no~u o~usto~urarija a kitakit, o~u masaʦəʦajaj a ʡo~uŋʦo~uj,miɬ~ɮo~uɬ~ɮo~uaj to~u awko~usto~u-ɾo~uto~uk ko~u kakaħaɬ~ɮ nira. o~u nika ʦimaraɬ~ɮ ko~una ɾo~uto~uk, o~urasaka ħaɾafin mapaʡo~uraɬ~ɮ kaħəŋaŋaj, o~uninian ko~u sakakaħəŋan a manəŋnəŋən no~u mita. o~u miħəʦaan no~una ɾo~uto~uk *** o~u maro~uʡaj itini a ananko~u-jo~u~unʦo~u~umin i ʡajaw no~u ʦəʦaj ʡo~ufaɬ~ɮ ko~u miħəʦaan itiniaj to~u a maro~uʡ. o~u makəraaj a ʦo~uka i ɬ~ɮapijaʦ ira ko~u **** miħəʦaan ko~u katəɾaŋ nira a ɾikisi. o~una o~u~uɾo~u~uɾo~u~u-ɾo~uto~uk o~uno~u ananko~u-jo~u~unʦo~u~umin a təkəɬ~ɮ a ɬ~ɮafo~uŋ, ano~u pakajniən i rikəʦ nipaʦaɾiwan no~u jo~u~unʦo~u~umin i sifo~u taħira i **** miħəʦaan. anini sato~u i, ano~u sapiʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮaw mi nəŋnəŋ to~una o~u~uɾo~u~uɾo~u~u-ɾo~uto~uk ʦaaj kaaj kaʡəʦa ka papajso~u to~u ** rimo~uʡo~uɬ~ɮ pajso~u no~u o~usto~urarija, maŋaʡaŋaj miɾafin to~u to~uɾo~u a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ. o~una pajso~u o~u sako~uwan no~u jo~u~unʦo~u~umin ko~u miso~uro~utaj ħaɾo~u pajso~u no~u jo~u~ub~b~vʦo~u~umin. ʦiʡiʦəɾ ko~u piɾaɾaŋ a mikariʦ to~una ʡo~uŋʦo~uj **** miħəʦa, ira ʦo~uwa ka ħajiən no~u jo~u~unʦo~u~umin patəɬ~ɮo~u sanaj a mikariʦ to~una o~u~uɾo~u~uɾo~u~u ʡo~uŋʦo~uj, tataʡaŋ ko~u faŋafaŋ itija. itira to~u a miɾijaw a miɾəkaɾ to~u piɾaɾaŋ a mikariʦ to~una ɾo~uto~uk.itira i ****miħəʦa saka**fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ sakaʦəʦaj ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ,ira ko~u pikajki no~u miko~uwanaj to~una o~u~uɾo~u~uɾo~u~u-kataʦəta ko~ujin no~u kitakit maɾaʦəʦaj ko~u pisətək to~u so~uwaɾ, i ****miħəʦa saka ** fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ saka ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ ʦiʡiʦəɾ to~u ko~u piɾaɾaŋ a mikariʦ to~una ʡo~uŋʦo~uj.
S.FORM: Ululu lotok O teked a lotok no Yuncumin no Ostorariya konini, i 1981 miheca matoro' no Linheko malo Palapalaan-dafong no hekal, pacaliwen no Yuncumin ko sifo patireng to Ululu-Kataceta Koyin no kitakit( :Uluṟu-Kata Tjuṯa National Park). Kaitiraan Ona lotok itiraay i satimolan no Saka'amisan-Etal no Ostorariya, o satata'angay a 'ongcoy no sasifo'an no Ostorariya, o kamaro'an nona 'ongcoy i laloma'ay no Ululu-Kataceta Koyin no kitakit. O samangataay a tokay cila'eday to 335 kilo, o palakitingay a lalan nani Ululu tahira I tokay ira ko 450 kilo. O fangcaly pala no Ananko-yuncumin no Ostorariya kona niyaro'.O tadamaanay dafong no hekal konini hananay to Linhoko a mitoro' kona pala. O kaitiraan nona 'ongcoy I sasifo'an no Ostorariya a kitakit, o masacecayay a 'ongcoy,midodoay to Awkosto-Lotok ko kakahad nira. O mihecaan nona lotok 的年齡 O maro'ay itini a Ananko-yuncumin I 'ayaw no cecay 'ofad ko mihecaan itiniay to a maro'. O makeraay a coka I dapiyac ira ko 1000 mihecaan ko katelang nira a likisi. Anini sato I, ano sapicomodaw mi nengneng tona Ululu-lotok caay kaay ka'eca ka papayso to 38 rimo'od payso no Ostorariya, manga'angay milafin to tolo a romi'ad. Ona payso o sakowan no yuncumin ko misorotay halo payso no yubcumin. Ci'icel ko pilalang a mikaric tona 'ongcoy 2020 miheca, ira cowa ka hayien no yuncumin patedo sanay a mikaric tona Ululu 'ongcoy, tata'ang ko fangafang itiya. Itira to a miliyaw a milekal to pilalang a mikaric tona lotok.Itira I 2017miheca saka11folad sakacecay romi'ad,ira ko pikayki no Mikowanay tona Ululu-Kataceta Koyin no kitakit malacecay ko pisetek to sowal, I 2019miheca saka 10 folad saka 26 romi'ad ci'icel to ko pilalang a mikaric tona 'ongcoy.

paʦaɾiwən no~u jo~u~unʦo~u~umin ko~u sifo~u patirəŋ to~u o~u~uɾo~u~uɾo~u~u-kataʦəta ko~ujin no~u kitakit( :o~u~uɾo~u~u*o~u~u-kata tjo~u~u*a natio~unaɾ park). kaitiraan o~una ɾo~uto~uk itiraaj i satimo~uɾan no~u sakaʡamisan-ətaɾ no~u o~usto~urarija, o~u satataʡaŋaj a ʡo~uŋʦo~uj no~u sasifo~uʡan no~u o~usto~urarija, o~u kamaro~uʡan no~una ʡo~uŋʦo~uj i ɾaɾo~umaʡaj no~u paɾa no~u ananko~u-jo~u~unʦo~u~umin no~u o~usto~urarija ko~una nijaro~uʡ.o~u taɬ~ɮamaanaj ɬ~ɮafo~uŋ no~u ħəkaɾ ko~unini ħananaj to~u ɾinħo~uko~u a mito~uro~uʡ ko~una paɾa. o~u kaitiraan no~una ʡo~uŋʦo~uj i sasifo~uʡan no~u o~usto~urarija a kitakit, o~u masaʦəʦajaj a ʡo~uŋʦo~uj,miɬ~ɮo~uɬ~ɮo~uaj to~u awko~usto~u-ɾo~uto~uk ko~u kakaħaɬ~ɮ nira. o~u nika ʦimaraɬ~ɮ ko~una ɾo~uto~uk, o~urasaka ħaɾafin mapaʡo~uraɬ~ɮ kaħəŋaŋaj, o~uninian ko~u sakakaħəŋan a manəŋnəŋən no~u mita. o~u miħəʦaan no~una ɾo~uto~uk *** o~u maro~uʡaj itini a ananko~u-jo~u~unʦo~u~umin i ʡajaw no~u ʦəʦaj ʡo~ufaɬ~ɮ ko~u miħəʦaan itiniaj to~u a maro~uʡ. o~u makəraaj a ʦo~uka i ɬ~ɮapijaʦ ira ko~u **** miħəʦaan ko~u katəɾaŋ nira a ɾikisi. o~una o~u~uɾo~u~uɾo~u~u-ɾo~uto~uk o~uno~u ananko~u-jo~u~unʦo~u~umin a təkəɬ~ɮ a ɬ~ɮafo~uŋ, ano~u pakajniən i rikəʦ nipaʦaɾiwan no~u jo~u~unʦo~u~umin i sifo~u taħira i **** miħəʦaan. anini sato~u i, ano~u sapiʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮaw mi nəŋnəŋ to~una o~u~uɾo~u~uɾo~u~u-ɾo~uto~uk ʦaaj kaaj kaʡəʦa ka papajso~u to~u ** rimo~uʡo~uɬ~ɮ pajso~u no~u o~usto~urarija, maŋaʡaŋaj miɾafin to~u to~uɾo~u a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ. o~una pajso~u o~u sako~uwan no~u jo~u~unʦo~u~umin ko~u miso~uro~utaj ħaɾo~u pajso~u no~u jo~u~ub~b~vʦo~u~umin. ʦiʡiʦəɾ ko~u piɾaɾaŋ a mikariʦ to~una ʡo~uŋʦo~uj **** miħəʦa, ira ʦo~uwa ka ħajiən no~u jo~u~unʦo~u~umin patəɬ~ɮo~u sanaj a mikariʦ to~una o~u~uɾo~u~uɾo~u~u ʡo~uŋʦo~uj, tataʡaŋ ko~u faŋafaŋ itija. itira to~u a miɾijaw a miɾəkaɾ to~u piɾaɾaŋ a mikariʦ to~una ɾo~uto~uk.itira i ****miħəʦa saka**fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ sakaʦəʦaj ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ,ira ko~u pikajki no~u miko~uwanaj to~una o~u~uɾo~u~uɾo~u~u-kataʦəta ko~ujin no~u kitakit maɾaʦəʦaj ko~u pisətək to~u so~uwaɾ, i ****miħəʦa saka ** fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ saka ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ ʦiʡiʦəɾ to~u ko~u piɾaɾaŋ a mikariʦ to~una ʡo~uŋʦo~uj.
